message.content:
I need to understand the world map editor UI system to add BaseGoldReward/BaseFoodReward editing fields. Read these files thoroughly:

1. Source/LFP2D/UI/WorldMapEditor/LFPWorldMapEditorWidget.h - full file
2. Source/LFP2D/UI/WorldMapEditor/LFPWorldMapEditorWidget.cpp - full file
3. Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapEditorComponent.h - full file
4. Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapEditorComponent.cpp - full file

I need to understand:
- How existing node properties (BattleMapName, StarRating, bCanEscape, EventID) are edited in the UI
- The BindWidget pattern used for the editor
- How property changes are applied to nodes (the data flow from UI input → node update)
- What widget types are used (SpinBox, EditableTextBox, CheckBox, etc.)
- The RefreshNodeProperties / ApplyNodeProperties pattern

content.text: I'll read these four files to understand the world map editor UI system.

content.content:
1→#pragma once
     2→
     3→#include "CoreMinimal.h"
     4→#include "Components/ActorComponent.h"
     5→#include "LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapData.h"
     6→#include "LFPWorldMapEditorComponent.generated.h"
     7→
     8→class ALFPWorldMapManager;
     9→class ALFPWorldMapNode;
    10→class ALFPWorldMapEdge;
    11→
    12→// 世界地图编辑器工具模式
    13→UENUM(BlueprintType)
    14→enum class ELFPWorldMapEditorTool : uint8
    15→{
    16→	WMET_None           UMETA(DisplayName = "无"),
    17→	WMET_PlaceNode      UMETA(DisplayName = "放置节点"),
    18→	WMET_RemoveNode     UMETA(DisplayName = "删除节点"),
    19→	WMET_MoveNode       UMETA(DisplayName = "移动节点"),
    20→	WMET_ConnectEdge    UMETA(DisplayName = "连接边"),
    21→	WMET_RemoveEdge     UMETA(DisplayName = "删除边"),
    22→	WMET_SetNodeParams  UMETA(DisplayName = "设置节点参数"),
    23→	WMET_EditBattleMap  UMETA(DisplayName = "编辑战斗地图")
    24→};
    25→
    26→DECLARE_DYNAMIC_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_OneParam(FOnWorldEditorToolChanged, ELFPWorldMapEditorTool, NewTool);
    27→DECLARE_DYNAMIC_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_OneParam(FOnWorldEditorModeChanged, bool, bEditorActive);
    28→DECLARE_DYNAMIC_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_OneParam(FOnWorldEditorNodeSelected, ALFPWorldMapNode*, SelectedNode);
    29→
    30→/**
    31→ * 世界地图编辑器组件：管理编辑器状态、工具切换、笔刷参数
    32→ * 挂载在 PlayerController 上
    33→ */
    34→UCLASS(Blueprintable, ClassGroup=(WorldMapEditor), meta=(BlueprintSpawnableComponent))
    35→class LFP2D_API ULFPWorldMapEditorComponent : public UActorComponent
    36→{
    37→	GENERATED_BODY()
    38→
    39→public:
    40→	ULFPWorldMapEditorComponent();
    41→
    42→	// 切换编辑器模式
    43→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "World Map Editor")
    44→	void ToggleEditorMode();
    45→
    46→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "World Map Editor")
    47→	bool IsEditorActive() const { return bEditorActive; }
    48→
    49→	// 设置工具
    50→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "World Map Editor")
    51→	void SetCurrentTool(ELFPWorldMapEditorTool Tool);
    52→
    53→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "World Map Editor")
    54→	ELFPWorldMapEditorTool GetCurrentTool() const { return CurrentTool; }
    55→
    56→	// ==== 笔刷参数 ====
    57→
    58→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "World Map Editor|Brush")
    59→	void SetBrushNodeType(ELFPWorldNodeType InType) { BrushNodeType = InType; }
    60→
    61→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "World Map Editor|Brush")
    62→	void SetBrushStarRating(int32 InRating) { BrushStarRating = FMath::Clamp(InRating, 1, 5); }
    63→
    64→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "World Map Editor|Brush")
    65→	void SetBrushCanEscape(bool bInCanEscape) { BrushCanEscape = bInCanEscape; }
    66→
    67→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "World Map Editor|Brush")
    68→	void SetBrushBattleMapName(const FString& InName) { BrushBattleMapName = InName; }
    69→
    70→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "World Map Editor|Brush")
    71→	void SetBrushEventID(const FString& InID) { BrushEventID = InID; }
    72→
    73→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "World Map Editor|Brush")
    74→	void SetBrushEdgeTurnCost(int32 InCost) { BrushEdgeTurnCost = FMath::Max(1, InCost); }
    75→
    76→	// ==== 操作方法 ====
    77→
    78→	// 在世界坐标处放置新节点
    79→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "World Map Editor")
    80→	ALFPWorldMapNode* PlaceNodeAt(FVector2D WorldPos);
    81→
    82→	// 选中已有节点（用于移动/连接/编辑参数）
    83→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "World Map Editor")
    84→	void SelectNode(ALFPWorldMapNode* Node);
    85→
    86→	// 对选中节点应用参数（SetNodeParams 工具）
    87→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "World Map Editor")
    88→	void ApplyParamsToSelectedNode();
    89→
    90→	// 开始连接边（第一次点击选中 FromNode，第二次点击选中 ToNode）
    91→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "World Map Editor")
    92→	void HandleEdgeConnection(ALFPWorldMapNode* Node);
    93→
    94→	// 移动选中节点到新位置
    95→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "World Map Editor")
    96→	void MoveSelectedNodeTo(FVector2D NewPos);
    97→
    98→	// 删除选中节点
    99→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "World Map Editor")
   100→	void RemoveSelectedNode();
   101→
   102→	// 删除边（点击两个节点）
   103→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "World Map Editor")
   104→	void HandleEdgeRemoval(ALFPWorldMapNode* Node);
   105→
   106→	// 进入战斗地图编辑（切换到内层编辑器）
   107→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "World Map Editor")
   108→	void EnterBattleMapEditor();
   109→
   110→	// 从战斗地图编辑返回
   111→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "World Map Editor")
   112→	void ReturnFromBattleMapEditor();
   113→
   114→	// 保存/加载
   115→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "World Map Editor")
   116→	bool SaveWorldMap(const FString& MapName);
   117→
   118→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "World Map Editor")
   119→	bool LoadWorldMap(const FString& MapName);
   120→
   121→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "World Map Editor")
   122→	TArray<FString> GetSavedWorldMapList();
   123→
   124→	// 新建空白世界地图
   125→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "World Map Editor")
   126→	void NewWorldMap();
   127→
   128→	// ==== 委托 ====
   129→
   130→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintAssignable, Category = "World Map Editor")
   131→	FOnWorldEditorToolChanged OnToolChanged;
   132→
   133→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintAssignable, Category = "World Map Editor")
   134→	FOnWorldEditorModeChanged OnEditorModeChanged;
   135→
   136→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintAssignable, Category = "World Map Editor")
   137→	FOnWorldEditorNodeSelected OnNodeSelected;
   138→
   139→	// 获取选中节点
   140→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "World Map Editor")
   141→	ALFPWorldMapNode* GetSelectedNode() const { return SelectedNode; }
   142→
   143→	// 是否正在编辑战斗地图
   144→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "World Map Editor")
   145→	bool IsEditingBattleMap() const { return bIsEditingBattleMap; }
   146→
   147→protected:
   148→	virtual void BeginPlay() override;
   149→
   150→	ALFPWorldMapManager* GetWorldMapManager() const;
   151→
   152→protected:
   153→	UPROPERTY(VisibleAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly)
   154→	bool bEditorActive = false;
   155→
   156→	UPROPERTY(VisibleAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly)
   157→	ELFPWorldMapEditorTool CurrentTool = ELFPWorldMapEditorTool::WMET_None;
   158→
   159→	// 笔刷参数
   160→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Brush")
   161→	ELFPWorldNodeType BrushNodeType = ELFPWorldNodeType::WNT_Battle;
   162→
   163→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Brush")
   164→	int32 BrushStarRating = 1;
   165→
   166→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Brush")
   167→	bool BrushCanEscape = true;
   168→
   169→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Brush")
   170→	FString BrushBattleMapName;
   171→
   172→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Brush")
   173→	FString BrushEventID;
   174→
   175→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Brush")
   176→	int32 BrushEdgeTurnCost = 1;
   177→
   178→	// 选中的节点（移动/连接/参数编辑用）
   179→	UPROPERTY()
   180→	TObjectPtr<ALFPWorldMapNode> SelectedNode;
   181→
   182→	// 边连接的第一个节点（等待第二个节点）
   183→	UPROPERTY()
   184→	TObjectPtr<ALFPWorldMapNode> EdgeStartNode;
   185→
   186→	// 边删除的第一个节点（等待第二个节点）
   187→	UPROPERTY()
   188→	TObjectPtr<ALFPWorldMapNode> EdgeRemovalStartNode;
   189→
   190→	// 是否正在编辑内层战斗地图
   191→	UPROPERTY(VisibleAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly)
   192→	bool bIsEditingBattleMap = false;
   193→
   194→	// 缓存
   195→	UPROPERTY()
   196→	mutable TObjectPtr<ALFPWorldMapManager> CachedWorldMapManager;
   197→};
   198→

content.text:
I've thoroughly reviewed all four files. Here's my analysis of the world map editor UI system:

## Data Flow Pattern

**UI Input → EditorComponent Brush Properties → Node Application**

1. **UI Layer** (LFPWorldMapEditorWidget.cpp)
   - EditableTextBox/CheckBox/ComboBox controls capture user input
   - OnTextCommitted/OnCheckStateChanged callbacks fire when user confirms input
   - Callbacks extract values and call EditorComponent setter methods

2. **Component Layer** (LFPWorldMapEditorComponent.h/cpp)
   - Brush properties store the current editing values (BrushStarRating, BrushBattleMapName, etc.)
   - Setter methods validate and store values (e.g., `SetBrushStarRating()` clamps 1-5)
   - `ApplyParamsToSelectedNode()` copies all brush properties to the selected node

3. **Node Application** (LFPWorldMapEditorComponent.cpp lines 137-158)
   - `ApplyParamsToSelectedNode()` directly assigns brush values to node properties
   - Updates node visuals if type changed
   - No separate "refresh" pattern—direct assignment

## Widget Types Used

- **ComboBoxString**: NodeType dropdown (lines 87, 36-47)
- **EditableTextBox**: StarRating, BattleMapName, EventID, EdgeTurnCost, WorldMapFileName (lines 90, 96, 99, 102, 106)
- **CheckBox**: CanEscape toggle (line 93)
- **Button**: Tool selection and file operations (lines 65-83, 109-115)
- **TextBlock**: Status display (lines 119, 122)

## BindWidget Pattern

All controls use `meta = (BindWidgetOptional)` (lines 64-122):
- Optional binding—if widget doesn't exist in UMG blueprint, no crash
- Widget names must match property names exactly (e.g., `PlaceNodeButton` in C++ = `PlaceNodeButton` in UMG)
- Binding happens automatically during widget construction

## Key Callback Pattern

```cpp
// Input callback
UFUNCTION() void OnStarRatingChanged(const FText& Text, ETextCommit::Type CommitType);

// Implementation
void ULFPWorldMapEditorWidget::OnStarRatingChanged(const FText& Text, ETextCommit::Type CommitType)
{
    if (!EditorComponent) return;
    int32 Rating = FCString::Atoi(*Text.ToString());
    EditorComponent->SetBrushStarRating(Rating);  // Set brush property
}

// Component setter
void SetBrushStarRating(int32 InRating) { BrushStarRating = FMath::Clamp(InRating, 1, 5); }

// Apply to node
void ApplyParamsToSelectedNode()
{
    if (!SelectedNode) return;
    SelectedNode->StarRating = BrushStarRating;  // Direct assignment
}
```

## For BaseGoldReward/BaseFoodReward

You'll need to:
1. Add brush properties to EditorComponent (e.g., `int32 BrushBaseGoldReward`)
2. Add setter methods (e.g., `SetBrushBaseGoldReward()`)
3. Add EditableTextBox controls to the widget (e.g., `BaseGoldRewardInput`)
4. Bind callbacks in NativeConstruct (e.g., `OnBaseGoldRewardChanged()`)
5. Add assignments in `ApplyParamsToSelectedNode()` (e.g., `SelectedNode->BaseGoldReward = BrushBaseGoldReward`)
6. Update `UpdateNodeInfo()` to display these values when node selected

The pattern is consistent: **no RefreshNodeProperties/ApplyNodeProperties distinction**—just direct property assignment through the brush system.
